title: ACDP Error Response
description: Standard error response returned by ACDP endpoints on failure.

code.description: A machine-readable error code from the ACDP standard error vocabulary. invalid_receipt is 0.2.0-only (RFC-ACDP-0010 §8, §11) and MUST NOT be emitted by registries declaring acdp_version 0.1.0. Codes reserved for future versions (not in this enum): immutable_field (a future version's mutation endpoints), unsupported_embedding_model (a future version's similarity endpoints).

details.description: Optional structured details about the error. Shape is error-code-specific. Recognized keys per code: superseded_target → 'reason' (one of 'not_found', 'lineage_mismatch', 'version_mismatch', 'already_superseded', 'cross_registry_supersession_unsupported'); invalid_signature → 'key_id', 'algorithm'; key_resolution_failed / key_resolution_unreachable → 'key_id', 'underlying' (transport-layer message); duplicate_publish → 'idempotency_key', 'original_ctx_id'. Registries MAY include additional keys; consumers MUST tolerate unknown keys.
